# ZENVIQ Digital
> Hanumangarh's #1 digital agency — premium web development, SEO, AI automation, and digital marketing.

## Core Pages
- [Home](https://www.zenviqdigital.in/): Full-service digital agency homepage with services, portfolio, testimonials
- [Services](https://www.zenviqdigital.in/services): Web development, UI/UX, SEO, AI automation, e-commerce
- [About](https://www.zenviqdigital.in/about): Team, mission, company story
- [Contact](https://www.zenviqdigital.in/contact): Get in touch, book a free consultation
- [Gallery](https://www.zenviqdigital.in/gallery): Project showcase and portfolio

## Services
- [Web Development](https://www.zenviqdigital.in/services/web-development): Next.js, React, WordPress, Shopify websites
- [UI/UX Design](https://www.zenviqdigital.in/services/ui-ux-design): Product design, prototyping, design systems
- [SEO Optimization](https://www.zenviqdigital.in/services/seo-optimization): Technical SEO, keyword research, link building
- [AI Automation](https://www.zenviqdigital.in/services/ai-automation): AI chatbots, workflow automation, custom AI solutions
- [E-commerce Development](https://www.zenviqdigital.in/services/ecommerce-development): Online stores, payment integration

## Free Tools
- [EMI Calculator](https://www.zenviqdigital.in/tools/emi-calculator): Loan EMI calculator
- [Word Counter](https://www.zenviqdigital.in/tools/word-counter): Text analysis tool
- [QR Code Generator](https://www.zenviqdigital.in/tools/qr-code-generator): Free QR code creation
- [Color Palette Generator](https://www.zenviqdigital.in/tools/color-palette): Design color tools
- [SKU Generator](https://www.zenviqdigital.in/tools/sku-generator): Product SKU creation

## Blog
- [Blog & Insights](https://www.zenviqdigital.in/blog): Digital marketing tips, guides, and industry insights

## Key Facts
- Founded in Hanumangarh, Rajasthan, India
- 50+ projects delivered
- 30+ happy clients
- 98% client retention rate
- Technologies: Next.js, React, TypeScript, WordPress, Shopify
- Contact: contact@zenviqdigital.in
